description: Composition White sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a minimalist dotted pattern, shoulder flaps, round neckline with a slit on the front, pin tucks with stitch detailing fanning out from the neck on either side and behind the collar, printed border design on the hemline and has slit side hems Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
